narrative:
Saltcreek Twp township has 655 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
